DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS IS PRESENT REPRESENT GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT DISMISS THE CASES AGAINST THE TWO DEFENDANTS THAT ARE NOT PRESENT AND WERE NOT SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
